title: BotSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents an organization’s Einstein Bot settings, such as whether or not Einstein Bots is enabled. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableBots.description: Indicates whether Einstein Bots is enabled (true) or not (false).

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a BotSetting. This example has been trimmed to make it easier to read.
